description_long: This is a futuristic black police car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and four large, cylindrical hover engines attached to each corner, giving it a floating appearance. The front features a metallic grille, two yellow headlights, and a central mounted device, possibly a siren or sensor. The roof is equipped with a prominent round emergency light, and additional smaller lights are mounted on the sides. The rear of the vehicle has a large central thruster and two more cylindrical engines, with green cables connecting the engines to the main body. The windows are tinted, and the car has a robust, armored look with white accent stripes running along the sides. The overall design suggests advanced technology, suitable for rapid response in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black futuristic police car with four large hover engines, emergency lights, and a robust armored body accented by white stripes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the metallic grille, yellow headlights, central mounted device, and three emergency lights on the roof and sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, two large hover engines, and visible roof equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the central thruster, two rear hover engines, green cables, and the tinted rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hover engines, side equipment, and the streamlined body.
attribute_emergency_lights: Three round emergency lights are visible: one large red light on the roof center, and two smaller red lights on each side of the roof. Additional red and white lights are integrated into the hover engines.
attribute_siren: A central mounted device on the front hood, likely a siren, is visible.
